name: Ransomware Lateral Movement
summary: A phishing-originated endpoint compromise spread through the domain before file encryption.

evidenceItems.summary: Suspicious Office child process on WS-014
Mass file rename and ransom note creation
File share encryption rate exceeded threshold

hypotheses.title: Targeted ransomware deployment
hypotheses.summary: A phishing payload enabled credential theft and controlled deployment across shares.
hypotheses.reasoning: Endpoint execution precedes privilege use, SMB fan-out, and rapid encryption across the estate.

hypotheses.title: Worm-like propagation
hypotheses.summary: A self-propagating payload may have spread through SMB.
hypotheses.reasoning: The rapid fan-out supports propagation, but privileged account activity indicates operator control.

evidenceGaps.description: Collect the original phishing message and attachment
